title: Portfolio Revision Game
genericDescription: Revisit old work with professional standards; decide what to preserve; measure improvement; prepare a game for a new platform or access context.
specificDescription: Choose one prior program game and rebuild or substantially revise it. The revision must include one substantial porting, optimization, or accessibility goal such as WebGL/HTML5 optimization, mobile touch controls, controller support, high-contrast mode, subtitle pass, or load-time reduction. Submit original and revised builds or videos, plus a change log explaining design and technical improvements.
gradingRubric: 30 pts improvement quality; 20 pts preservation of core idea; 20 pts polish and platform/access readiness; 15 pts before/after evidence; 15 pts reflection.
